actions.script: var nativeSetter=Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(window.HTMLInputElement.prototype,'value').set;function setReactInput(el,val){nativeSetter.call(el,val);el.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true}));el.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));}async function typeInInput(el,text){el.focus();setReactInput(el,'');await new Promise(function(r){setTimeout(r,300)});for(var c=0;c<text.length;c++){var current=text.substring(0,c+1);nativeSetter.call(el,current);el.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true}));await new Promise(function(r){setTimeout(r,50+Math.random()*80)});}el.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));}function hasTurnstileIframe(){var iframes=document.querySelectorAll('iframe');for(var i=0;i<iframes.length;i++){if(iframes[i].src&&iframes[i].src.indexOf('challenges.cloudflare.com')!==-1)return true;}return false;}async function requestTurnstileFocus(){return new Promise(function(resolve){console.log('[Ahrefs] Requesting Turnstile focus from extension...');var timeout=setTimeout(function(){window.removeEventListener('message',handler);resolve({success:false,reason:'timeout'});},60000);function handler(event){if(event.source===window&&event.data&&event.data.type==='TURNSTILE_FOCUS_RESPONSE'){clearTimeout(timeout);window.removeEventListener('message',handler);console.log('[Ahrefs] Turnstile focus response:',event.data);resolve(event.data);}}window.addEventListener('message',handler);window.postMessage({type:'TURNSTILE_FOCUS_REQUEST'},'*');});}async function waitForModalWithFocusQueue(maxRetries){for(var attempt=0;attempt<maxRetries;attempt++){var modal=null;var startTime=Date.now();var turnstileCheckDelay=2000;var focusRequested=false;var modalTimeout=60000;await new Promise(function(r){setTimeout(r,turnstileCheckDelay);});if(hasTurnstileIframe()&&!focusRequested){console.log('[Ahrefs] Turnstile detected, requesting focus queue...');focusRequested=true;var focusResult=await requestTurnstileFocus();console.log('[Ahrefs] Focus queue result:',focusResult);if(focusResult.reason==='modal_appeared'||focusResult.reason==='solved'||focusResult.reason==='no_turnstile'){modal=document.querySelector('.ReactModalPortal [role="dialog"]')||document.querySelector('[class*="ReactModal__Content"]');if(modal){var hasValues=modal.querySelectorAll('span[class*="css-vyilnr"]');if(hasValues&&hasValues.length>0){return{success:true,modal:modal,attempts:attempt+1};}}}}while(Date.now()-startTime<modalTimeout){modal=document.querySelector('.ReactModalPortal [role="dialog"]')||document.querySelector('[class*="ReactModal__Content"]');if(modal){var hasValues=modal.querySelectorAll('span[class*="css-vyilnr"]');if(hasValues&&hasValues.length>0){return{success:true,modal:modal,attempts:attempt+1};}}if(hasTurnstileIframe()&&!focusRequested&&Date.now()-startTime>5000){console.log('[Ahrefs] Late Turnstile detected, requesting focus queue...');focusRequested=true;var focusResult=await requestTurnstileFocus();console.log('[Ahrefs] Focus queue result:',focusResult);}await new Promise(function(r){setTimeout(r,500);});}if(modal){var hasValues=modal.querySelectorAll('span[class*="css-vyilnr"]');if(hasValues&&hasValues.length>0){return{success:true,modal:modal,attempts:attempt+1};}}if(attempt<maxRetries-1){console.log('[Ahrefs] Modal timeout, refreshing page (attempt '+(attempt+1)+'/'+maxRetries+')');window.location.reload();await new Promise(function(r){setTimeout(r,5000);});var inputReady=false;var inputWaitStart=Date.now();while(Date.now()-inputWaitStart<15000){var inp=document.querySelector("input[type='text']")||document.querySelector("input[placeholder='Enter domain']");if(inp){inputReady=true;break;}await new Promise(function(r){setTimeout(r,500);});}if(!inputReady){return{success:false,error:'input not found after refresh',attempts:attempt+1};}await new Promise(function(r){setTimeout(r,2000);});}}return{success:false,error:'modal timeout after '+maxRetries+' attempts',attempts:maxRetries};}var domainList='${domains}'.split(',').map(function(d){return d.trim()}).filter(function(d){return d.length>0});var allResults=[];for(var i=0;i<domainList.length;i++){var currentDomain=domainList[i];var input=document.querySelector("input[type='text']")||document.querySelector("input[placeholder='Enter domain']");if(!input){allResults.push({domain_name:currentDomain,error:'input not found'});continue;}await typeInInput(input,currentDomain);await new Promise(function(r){setTimeout(r,500)});var submitted=false;var form=input.closest('form');if(form){form.dispatchEvent(new Event('submit',{bubbles:true,cancelable:true}));submitted=true;}if(!submitted){var submitBtn=document.querySelector("form button[type='submit']");if(!submitBtn){var allBtns=[].slice.call(document.querySelectorAll('button'));submitBtn=allBtns.find(function(b){return b.textContent.includes('Check Authority');});}if(submitBtn){submitBtn.click();submitted=true;}}if(!submitted){input.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keydown',{key:'Enter',code:'Enter',keyCode:13,which:13,bubbles:true}));input.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keypress',{key:'Enter',code:'Enter',keyCode:13,which:13,bubbles:true}));input.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keyup',{key:'Enter',code:'Enter',keyCode:13,which:13,bubbles:true}));}var waitResult=await waitForModalWithFocusQueue(3);if(!waitResult.success){allResults.push({domain_name:currentDomain,error:waitResult.error,turnstile_retries:waitResult.attempts});continue;}var modal=waitResult.modal;await new Promise(function(r){setTimeout(r,3000)});var values=[].slice.call(modal.querySelectorAll('span[class*="css-vyilnr"]')).map(function(e){return e.textContent.trim()});var dofollow=[].slice.call(modal.querySelectorAll('p')).filter(function(p){return p.textContent.includes('dofollow')}).map(function(p){return p.textContent.trim()});var dr=values[0]||null;var backlinks=values[1]||null;var linking_websites=values[2]||null;var bl_df=dofollow[0]?dofollow[0].match(/(\d+)%/)?.[1]:null;var lw_df=dofollow[1]?dofollow[1].match(/(\d+)%/)?.[1]:null;allResults.push({domain_name:currentDomain,dr:dr,backlinks:backlinks,backlinks_dofollow_percentage:bl_df,linking_websites:linking_websites,linking_websites_dofollow_percentage:lw_df,turnstile_retries:waitResult.attempts});var closeBtn=modal.querySelector('button[class*="closeButton"]')||document.querySelector('button[class*="closeButton"]');if(!closeBtn){var svgClose=modal.querySelector('svg[class*="close"]')||modal.querySelector('[aria-label="Close"]');if(svgClose)closeBtn=svgClose.closest('button')||svgClose;}if(!closeBtn){var allCloseBtns=[].slice.call(modal.querySelectorAll('button'));closeBtn=allCloseBtns.find(function(b){return b.getAttribute('aria-label')==='Close'||b.textContent.trim()==='X'||b.textContent.trim()==='x'||b.textContent.trim()==='';});}if(closeBtn)closeBtn.click();await new Promise(function(r){setTimeout(r,2000)});var stillModal=document.querySelector('.ReactModalPortal [role="dialog"]')||document.querySelector('[class*="ReactModal__Content"]');if(stillModal){var overlay=document.querySelector('[class*="ReactModal__Overlay"]');if(overlay)overlay.click();await new Promise(function(r){setTimeout(r,1000)});}}return JSON.stringify({total_domains:domainList.length,results:allResults});
